applied_optimizations.name: torch.compile with mode=default
applied_optimizations.description: Applied torch.compile(mode='default') to fuse elementwise operations (scale1, avg_pool, bias add, scale2). Compiled the forward method lazily on first invocation.

attempted_but_failed.name: Manual Triton kernel with flat 1D grid
attempted_but_failed.reason: Integer division precision issues when decoding 5D indices from flat index for large batch sizes (128). Correctness failures at batch indices >= 64.

attempted_but_failed.name: Manual Triton kernel with per-(batch,channel) programs
attempted_but_failed.reason: Serial loops inside kernel caused 10x slowdown (21ms vs 3.4ms)

attempted_but_failed.name: Manual Triton kernel with 3D grid (batch*channels, depth, height*width)
attempted_but_failed.reason: Excessive kernel launch overhead - 11x slower (37.8ms vs 3.4ms)

notes: ConvTranspose3d is already highly optimized by MIOpen/CK kernels (~64% of time)
Elementwise ops (scale, bias, avg_pool) account for ~35% of time - good fusion candidates
torch.compile(mode='default') provides 7% speedup by fusing elementwise ops
Manual Triton kernels struggled with 5D indexing - integer division for flat index decoding caused correctness issues at large batch sizes
Triton on AMD (MI355X) only supports 3D grids (program_id 0, 1, 2)
Further optimization would require: (1) better Triton kernel design with proper tiling, or (2) optimizing ConvTranspose3d itself which is the dominant bottleneck

attempted_but_failed.name: trial_4
attempted_but_failed.reason: Trial 4 produced no output again - the agent has stalled 3 times. With 37 min remaining, providing explicit working code to try incremental improvements on top of the score-60.80 baseline.

attempted_but_failed.name: trial_5
attempted_but_failed.reason: Agent has stalled 4 consecutive trials producing no output. With 37 minutes remaining, providing a complete copy-paste solution file that fuses scale1 into weights and uses torch.compile for the remai

global_notes: Problem 50 is dominated by ConvTranspose3d which is already well-optimized by MIOpen
The elementwise fusion opportunities are limited (~35% of total time)
